Title: Rutles Highway Revisited
Label: Shimmy Disc
Notes: Produced and Engineered by Kramer at Noise New York 1990 20 track compilation with Unrest, Bongwater, Shonen Knife, Daniel Johnston, etc. From liner notes (a supposed interview with ex-Rutle Ron Nasty (Neil Innes))… Debbie: - O.K., here's the first track. It's by GALAXIE 500. Ron: - Another bloody sequel! Which one have they done? Debbie: - Cheese and Onions Ron: - I like the start, I think this lot have got something, probably constipation, they're obviously high on laxatives…yep, they're speeding up…heading for the lavatory…aaaahh…nope! Ah well, back to the laxatives.

Title: Gigantic 2
Label: Melody Maker
Notes: Live. Melody Maker/Rough Trade compilation. Recorded live in Amsterdam “Nineteen for the Nineties” compilation with Lush, Pale Saints, Mazzy Star…
